title: carex basiantha
intro: Carex basiantha, also known as Eastern sea blite, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating urinary and kidney issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and saponins, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, contributing to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving kidney function. In herbal preparations, Carex basiantha can be found in teas, infusions, or dried extracts, often used in traditional medicine to support urinary health and alleviate symptoms associated with kidney stones and urinary tract infections.
